heroSection.headline: Build Your Digital Presence with Precision
heroSection.subheadline: Custom web engineered for performance and growth

aboutSection.content_story: Founded in 2024 by a team of passionate IT students, SopaTek began as a shared vision to bridge the gap between academic knowledge and professional web development. Recognizing that many businesses struggle with outdated or ineffective websites, we've dedicated ourselves to delivering modern, performance-driven web solutions tailored to each client's unique needs.
aboutSection.mission_content: Empower businesses through custom web development combining cutting-edge technology with user-centric design.
aboutSection.vision_content: Become the preferred web partner for businesses seeking quality and reliability.

project.title: Our Latest Projects
project.subtitle: Discover what our team has recently accomplished.

1.title: e-kaly
1.description: A modern online food delivery platform allowing users to browse restaurants, order meals, and track deliveries in real time.

2.title: Typing Trainer
2.description: A fun and interactive typing practice application designed to improve speed and accuracy through real-time challenges.

3.title: E-commerce Platform
3.description: A complete online shopping system featuring product management, a secure checkout process, and an intuitive user experience.

4.title: Trano Ahofa
4.description: A real estate platform that helps users browse properties, compare options, and connect with owners or agents instantly.
